Eurotech’s optimized computing techniques draw from our expertise in low power design, miniaturization of platforms, and simplification of application development through middleware and toolsets and device cloud capabilities thereby allowing our customers to focus on their core competencies, the products and services only they can deliver, while Eurotech lays the embedded computing foundation to bring those offerings to market as quickly as possible.
